commit.message:
refactor: rename survey-level axes (core→foundation, diff→progress+gap)

Clearer mapping from paper-level annotations to survey-level synthesis:
- core assumptions → foundation (shared technical building blocks)
- diff → progress (trajectory of advances) + gap (structural unsolved problems)
- Add aggregation logic explanation in SKILL.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix HTTP request duration panels to use available metrics

Replace histogram_quantile queries on non-existent _bucket metrics
with avg (sum/count) and max latency using _sum, _count, and _max.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard: correct datasource UID and metric names

- Set explicit UID on provisioned Prometheus datasource to match dashboard
- Update all panel queries to use actual crawler_* prefixed metric names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): fix split face extrusion and visual artifacts

Three fixes for push-pull after face splitting:
1. Push-pull preview now only moves the selected face's vertices (via
   triangleIndices) instead of all coplanar vertices on the plane
2. Removed computeVertexNormals() after kernel extrude — toBufferGeometry
   already provides correct flat normals; smooth normals caused visible
   triangulation seams
3. Face selection highlight and double-click now use HEMesh-aware face
   detection (buildFaceDataFromHE) instead of coplanar scan, so individual
   split faces are correctly identified

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): fix splitFace origins, extrude wall winding, and orphan cleanup

- Fix splitFace: swap split HE origins (endV→startV for face A, startV→endV for face B)
  to prevent duplicate vertices in face loops causing degenerate triangulation
- Fix extrude Case 2/3: remove direction-dependent wall winding ternary, always use
  [oldA, oldB, newB, newA] for consistent twin relationships
- Add detachBoundaryHE for cleaning up orphaned boundary HEs after extrude Case 3
- Unlink boundary HEs from chain before deletion in addFace to prevent stale pointers
- Add stricter validate(): twin origin consistency + duplicate vertex detection

All 64 kernel tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove OpenClaw-unrecognized config keys from install-aida.sh

Remove compaction.memoryFlush, tools.loopDetection, and contextPruning
injections that cause OpenClaw 2026.3.x to reject config and block
agent startup (Gap 5 from E2E v2.1 assessment).

cognitive calibration.

commit.message:
fix: remove Buy LAUNCH / Buy COIN buttons from bot welcome

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: task read/list endpoints (Issue #15) (#27)

* Add task read/list endpoints (#15)

Implement GET /workflows/{workflow_id}/tasks/{task_id} and
GET /workflows/{workflow_id}/tasks with full RFC compliance:

- State-dependent HATEOAS links for all 8 task statuses
- Cursor-based pagination (Pattern 19) with total_count
- Status, caller, since/until filtering on list endpoint
- RFC field names: caller (not principal_agent_id), executor (not executor_agent_id)
- Completed tasks include result, warnings, quality, duration_seconds
- Running tasks include progress, estimated_completion (no result)
- Summary list items exclude input/result payload

34 tests covering all statuses, HATEOAS links, pagination,
error cases, field name compliance, and auth requirements.

Closes #15

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix task read/list endpoints for RFC compliance (#15)

Correct HATEOAS links to use {"href": "..."} format uniformly.
Fix status-dependent links per spec (cancelled/retasked/redirected
have no action links). Change list response to use top-level items,
total_count, limit, cursor, has_more fields. Add priority filter.
Move TaskPriority import to module level. Expand tests to 42.

Closes #15

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix PR #27 review: systemic link fixes, response structure alignment

Addresses all 5 blockers from Nexus review plus non-blocking items:

SYSTEMIC: Build status->links reference table (_STATUS_ACTION_LINKS)
as single source of truth for build_task_links(). Table-driven design
replaces ad-hoc if/elif chain, making link correctness auditable.

BLOCKER 1: resume link now points to /tasks/{id}/resume (was /tasks/{id})
BLOCKER 2: All action links include method: "POST" per RFC section 3.6
BLOCKER 3: stream link added to all responses (detail + summary)
BLOCKER 4: Paused tasks now expose context and redirect links
BLOCKER 5: List response restructured:
  - "items" -> "data" array
  - Flat pagination fields -> nested "pagination" object
  - "cursor" -> "next_cursor"
  - Cursor tiebreaker: (created_at, task_id) tuple comparison
  - Order by includes task_id as secondary sort

NON-BLOCKING: Added comment documenting intentional quality defaults

Cancelled status now includes rerun link per RFC reference table.
Tests expanded from 37 to 53 covering all new contract requirements.
298/298 tests passing across full suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: align test_task_run link assertions with approved RFC table design

---------

Co-authored-by: root <root@mlops-kelvin.marbell.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: reject Unknown Boss immediately instead of 90s resolve timeout (v1.9.6)

When OCR fails and creates an "Unknown Boss" encounter, the FSM would sit
in FIGHT_RESOLVING for 90s before abandoning, blocking detection of the
real boss. Three fixes:
- Accept valid boss name during resolving when current is Unknown
- Use 15s timeout for Unknown Boss even when encounter was notified
- Sync watcher boss name when FSM updates it during resolving

commit.message:
Rename pixel-plumber to 'Retro Mario' in seed data (#42)

The game HTML and live DB were updated directly (uploads/games is
gitignored — runtime content). Seed reflects the new title for fresh
installs.

Also fixed the mushroom enemy bug in the game file: goombas were spawning
at y=item.y*TILE (ground surface row), causing the wall collision midpoint
to hit the solid ground tile every frame, which reversed vx continuously
and pinned enemies in the ground unable to move. Fix: spawn at
(item.y-1)*TILE so enemies land on the surface correctly.

- Move Windows data to appendix, labeled exploratory with explicit non-comparability notes
- Rewrite roadmap: fix Phase 1 bugs, then same-hardware cross-OS, then consumer validation
- Clean up AI-sounding phrasing throughout

feat(P3): 動態止損追蹤（Watch 升級）— 移動止損自動追蹤

新增 WatchEntry 移動止損（Trailing Stop）功能：

ORM + Migration
- schema.py：WatchEntry 新增 trailing_stop_enabled（bool）、trailing_atr_multiplier（float）、highest_price_since_entry（float）
- migrate.py：對應 ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN 遷移規則

核心邏輯（main.py）
- _compute_trailing_stop()：純函數，stop = highest - ATR14 × mult，round 2 位
- _watch_update_status()：每次執行自動更新 highest_price_since_entry，計算新止損並在「只升不降」條件下寫入 DB
- watch add --trailing / --trailing-multiplier：新增移動止損 CLI 旗標
- watch list：顯示「[T×1.5]」標記區分移動 vs 靜態止損

Dashboard（position_monitoring.py）
- 總覽 Tab：新增「類型」欄（[T]移動 / 靜態）
- 個股走勢 Tab：移動止損以橙色虛線 #FF8C00 顯示；靜態止損用紅色
- 指標卡：移動止損持倉顯示第 5 格「追蹤最高」（highest_price_since_entry）

data_loader.py：load_watch_entries_with_status() 回傳 trailing 欄位

測試（tests/test_watch.py）
- 新增 8 個純函數 + ORM 測試，覆蓋 basic/rounding/multiplier/rises/orm-fields/default/update/only-moves-up
- 全套測試：681 passed（+8 vs 673）

commit.message:
fix(ci): exclude wintun embed package from Windows Go tests

daemon/wintun embeds wintun_amd64.dll via go:embed but DLLs are
gitignored (generated by go generate). CI doesn't run go generate,
so exclude wintun subpackage and cmd/k2 (which imports it).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: transfer round progression control from host to asker

The player who created the ranking now controls the pace of their round,
instead of the host.

Server (action/route.ts):
- open-guessing, close-guess, reveal-result, next-rank, show-summary:
  changed auth from isHost → isAsker (player_id === asker_player_id)
- next-round, end-game remain host-only (between-round transitions)

Screens:
- RevealMiddleScreen: isHost → isAsker for "予想スタート" button
- GuessingScreen: asker always sees "締め切る"; removed button from participant views
- GuessingClosedScreen: isHost → isAsker for "結果を公開" button
- ResultScreen: isHost → isAsker for "次のランクを予想する" / "ラウンド結果を見る"
- Waiting messages now show asker's name instead of "ホスト"

commit.message:
Initial commit: dynamic foraging experiment MVP

Browser-based two-option depleting-patch task generating behavioral
time-series data. Implements history-sensitive reinforcement dynamics
with 4 hidden phases, continuous recovery/event-based depletion, and
Phase 4 bonus pulses. Includes consent screen, Prolific ID entry,
practice block with 5s countdown, live leaderboard, and automatic
Firestore upload on completion.
